PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO ENFORCE TERMS OF INTERLOCUTORY JUDGMENT. JUDGE: THOMAS J. MELLON, JR.; CLERK: DAN MACDUFF; REPORTER: MARY J. HINDS; BAILIFF: LOUISE PIEROTTI. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF WITH COUNSEL, RANDALL CHOY, ESQ.; DEFENDANT BY COUNSEL, SAUL FERSTER, ESQ. THE COURT ORDERS THAT WHEN THE CURRENT ESCROW CLOSES, $105,000.00 OTHERWISE PAYABLE TO DEFENDANT COX SHALL BE HELD PENDING RESOLUTION OF THE OUTSTANDING ISSUES HEREIN. IF THE CURRENT ESCROW COMPANY AGREES TO BE BOUND BY THIS COURT'S ORDER, THEN THAT COMPANY SHALL HOLD THE FUNDS IN AN INTEREST-BEARING ACCOUNT. IF THE ESCROW COMPANY DOES NOT AGREE, THEN, UPON RECEIPT OF HIS SHARE OF THE DISTRIBUTION, DEFENDANT COX SHALL PAY $105,000.00 TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO BE HELD IN AN INTEREST-BEARING ACCOUNT. ALL OTHER MATTERS ARE RESERVED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE AN ORDER.

Motion To Enforce Terms Of Interlocutory Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-08-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Enforce Terms of Interlocutory Judgment. Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: Mary J. Hinds; Bailiff: Louise Pierotti. APPEARANCES: Plaintiff with counsel, Randall Choy, Esq.; defendant by counsel, Saul Ferster, Esq. The court orders that when the current escrow closes, $105,000.00 otherwise payable to defendant Cox shall be held pending resolution of the outstanding issues herein. If the current escrow company agrees to be bound by this court's order, then that company shall hold the funds in an interest-bearing account. If the escrow company does not agree, then, upon receipt of his share of the distribution, defendant Cox shall pay $105,000.00 to plaintiff's counsel to be held in an interest-bearing account. All other matters are reserved. Plaintiff's counsel to prepare an order.
